source_file: scripts/11_coloc_eqtlcatalogue.R; eQTL Catalogue QTD000316; FinnGen R13 L12_PSORIASIS
notes: eQTL Catalogue GTEx V8 dataset; tissue-dependent coloc evidence; Overlap lead SNPs are selected only among variants shared by the eQTL and GWAS inputs, ordered by association p-value with deterministic tie-breaking; they need not equal the full-locus lead SNP.
prior_sensitivity_interpretation: PP.H4 remained >=0.50 at p12=1e-5 and larger evaluated p12 values, but fell below 0.50 at sufficiently smaller evaluated p12 values.
